preconditions: User is on the login page
User has valid username and password
steps: 2. Enter valid <username> in the Username field
3. Enter valid <password> in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Home page with a welcome message

preconditions: User is on the login page
steps: 2. Enter invalid <username> in the Username field
3. Enter invalid <password> in the Password field
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

preconditions: User is on the login page
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation messages appear indicating required fields are empty

test_cases.test_case: Create a new client with valid details
preconditions: User is on the Clients page
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields in the Create Client form
test_cases.expected_result: A new client is created and appears in the Clients list with Pending status

test_cases.test_case: Create a new client with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the Clients page
steps: 2. Leave the First Name and Last Name fields empty
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation messages appear indicating required fields are missing

test_cases.test_case: Create a new client with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the Clients page
steps: 2. Fill in the First Name and Last Name fields with maximum allowed characters
test_cases.expected_result: A new client is created successfully with maximum length names

test_cases.test_case: Activate a Pending client with a valid activation date
preconditions: A client exists in Pending status
steps: 1. Navigate to the Client Detail page of a Pending client
3. Enter <valid activation date> in the Activation Date field
test_cases.expected_result: Client status badge updates to 'Active' (green chip) on the Client Detail page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to activate a Pending client with an invalid activation date
preconditions: A client exists in Pending status
steps: 1. Navigate to the Client Detail page of a Pending client
3. Enter <invalid activation date> in the Activation Date field
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the activation date is invalid

test_cases.test_case: Activate a Pending client with an activation date before submission date
preconditions: A client exists in Pending status
steps: 1. Navigate to the Client Detail page of a Pending client
3. Enter a date that is before the submission date in the Activation Date field
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the activation date cannot be before the submission date
